thesis_summary: Long bias remains actionable only if the open treats 27365-27390 as reclaimed support and price is back above VWAP by mid-morning.

checks.label: Open holds above reclaimed overnight support
checks.rationale: The bullish thesis depends on the overnight reclaim remaining accepted, not becoming a failed premarket squeeze.

checks.label: Opening print does not become trend-down
checks.rationale: An open dip is acceptable, but immediate downside continuation would align with the bearish Thursday reversal template.

checks.label: First 30 minutes avoids deep support failure
checks.rationale: A break below 27340 would show the overnight reclaim is failing and would reopen the lower range.

checks.label: Price is above VWAP by 10:00
checks.rationale: Reclaim-trend days need VWAP acceptance; below-VWAP trade by 10:00 favors chop or liquidation.

checks.label: Price accepts above pre-open high zone
checks.rationale: Holding above 27475 by 10:30 confirms buyers are not just defending but extending.
